title: rubus serpens var. flaviflorens
intro: Rubus serpens var. flaviflorens, also known as the yellow-flowering creeping raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus serpens species that is native to China and is characterized by its yellow flowers and edible fruit. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to help with various health issues such as reducing fever and treating digestive problems. The health benefits of Rubus serpens var. flaviflorens include its ability to boost the immune system, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
